item.title: 5 Smart Saving Tips During Inflation Without Sacrificing Lifestyle
item.description: Inflation squeezing your purchasing power? Discover 5 smart money-saving strategies that effectively protect your finances without compromising your quality of life.

item.title: Fed Cuts Interest Rate by 25bps: Major Impact on IHSG and Rupiah in 2026
item.description: The Federal Reserve cut its benchmark interest rate by 25 basis points for the first time in 2026. Read our analysis of the impact on Indonesian stocks and currency.

item.title: Inflation 2026: 3 Investment Strategies to Protect Your Wealth
item.description: Indonesia's inflation eased to 3.5 percent in 2026, but purchasing power remains under pressure. Discover 3 powerful investment strategies to shield your assets from inflation erosion.

item.title: Mutual Funds vs Stocks: Which is Best for Beginners in 2026?
item.description: Confused about choosing between mutual funds and stocks to start investing? Read our comprehensive comparison plus step-by-step investment strategy for beginners.
